title: oenothera primiveris var. bufonis
intro: Oenothera primiveris var. bufonis is a variant of the evening primrose plant, also known as a poisonous plant found in North America. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing due to its high content of phenolic compounds. However, I couldn't find information on herbal preparations using this specific variant of the evening primrose plant, and it's essential to exercise caution when handling this plant due to its toxic properties.
